subject: [PATCH 5/6] mm/migrate_device: move softleaf_to_folio() inside device-private branch

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Identified the patch as correct and safe, giving it an LGTM and Acked-by.

2026-06-30.patch_summary: The patch moves the softleaf_to_folio() call inside a device-private branch in mm/migrate_device.c to prevent unsafe folio lookups and ensure correct behavior for PMD swap entries.
